_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Greater than 98% of the cells from CTX, CB, and BS astroglial cultures were GFAP+
details: Greater than 98% of cells from cortex, cerebellum, and brainstem astroglial cultures were GFAP+
